archive_objects_check.name: archive_objects_check
archive_objects_check.value: ((sample_start IS NULL) AND (sample_end IS NULL)) OR ((sample_start >= 0) AND (sample_end > sample_start))

archives_check.name: archives_check
archives_check.value: ((hold_operation_id IS NULL) = (hold_operation_owner IS NULL)) AND ((hold_operation_id IS NULL) = (hold_operation_kind IS NULL)) AND ((hold_operation_id IS NULL) = (hold_operation_started_at IS NULL)) AND ((hold_operation_id IS NULL) = (hold_operation_lease_expires_at IS NULL))

consultation_participants_check1.name: consultation_participants_check1
consultation_participants_check1.value: ((consent_version IS NULL) = (consent_copy_hash IS NULL)) AND ((consent_version IS NULL) = (consent_snapshot_hash IS NULL)) AND ((consent_version IS NULL) = (consented_at IS NULL))

consultations_check1.name: consultations_check1
consultations_check1.value: (state = 'invited'::consultation_state) OR (room_name IS NOT NULL) OR (state = ANY (ARRAY['cancelled'::consultation_state, 'deleted'::consultation_state]))

expected_archive_artifacts_check.name: expected_archive_artifacts_check
expected_archive_artifacts_check.value: ((sample_start IS NULL) AND (sample_end IS NULL)) OR ((sample_start >= 0) AND (sample_end > sample_start))

expected_archive_artifacts_check1.name: expected_archive_artifacts_check1
expected_archive_artifacts_check1.value: ((segment_start IS NULL) AND (segment_end IS NULL)) OR ((segment_start >= 0) AND (segment_end > segment_start))

external_effects_egress_intent_redacted_.name: external_effects_egress_intent_redacted_check
external_effects_egress_intent_redacted_.value: effect_kind NOT IN ('ROOM_COMPOSITE_EGRESS', 'PARTICIPANT_EGRESS') OR request_bytes IS NULL OR lower(convert_from(request_bytes, 'UTF8')) !~ '"(accesskey|secret|custombaseurl|signature|authorization|token|filenameprefix|playlistname|liveplaylistname)"'

language_capabilities_check.name: language_capabilities_check
language_capabilities_check.value: ((mode = 'same_language'::text) AND (translation_provider IS NULL) AND (tts_provider IS NULL)) OR ((mode = 'translated'::text) AND (translation_provider IS NOT NULL) AND (translation_endpoint IS NOT NULL) AND (translation_model IS NOT NULL) AND (translation_code IS NOT NULL) AND (tts_provider IS NOT NULL) AND (tts_endpoint IS NOT NULL) AND (tts_model IS NOT NULL) AND (tts_voice IS NOT NULL) AND (tts_format IS NOT NULL) AND (tts_limits IS NOT NULL))

magic_links_check.name: magic_links_check
magic_links_check.value: (purpose <> 'archive_delete_reauth'::magic_link_purpose) OR ((user_id IS NOT NULL) AND (consultation_id IS NOT NULL) AND (session_id IS NOT NULL))

provider_attempts_check1.name: provider_attempts_check1
provider_attempts_check1.value: ((transport IS NULL) AND (raw_http IS NULL) AND (raw_websocket IS NULL) AND (raw_grpc IS NULL)) OR ((transport = 'http'::transport_kind) AND (raw_http IS NOT NULL) AND (raw_websocket IS NULL) AND (raw_grpc IS NULL)) OR ((transport = 'websocket'::transport_kind) AND (raw_http IS NULL) AND (raw_websocket IS NOT NULL) AND (raw_grpc IS NULL)) OR ((transport = 'grpc'::transport_kind) AND (raw_http IS NULL) AND (raw_websocket IS NULL) AND (raw_grpc IS NOT NULL))

provider_attempts_check2.name: provider_attempts_check2
provider_attempts_check2.value: (terminal_at IS NULL) OR ((transport IS NOT NULL) AND (retry_decision IS NOT NULL) AND (terminal_hash IS NOT NULL))
